title: Rich Silky Indian Cabbage Butter Chicken
description: Energizing and aromatic Indian dish featuring Chinese cabbage in a rich creamy sauce, served with a side of fluffy basmati rice.

ingredients.name: Chinese Cabbage
ingredients.notes: Any variety, but Napa or Savoy work well.

instructions: In a blender, combine garlic, ginger, garam masala, Kashmiri chilies, cumin, cocoa powder, and 1 tablespoon of butter. Blend until smooth.
Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add the blended mixture and cook, stirring constantly, for 2 minutes.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
In a large saucepan, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat. Add the vegetable oil, Chinese cabbage, and a pinch of salt. Cook until the cabbage is tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the tomato puree, heavy cream, garam masala, cumin, salt, and black pepper to the saucepan. Stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the saucepan and simmer, uncovered, for 10-12 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the chopped cilantro and serve hot over basmati rice.
